signal.title: Imagine if your Teams or Slack messages automatically turned into secure context for your AI agents — PromptQL built it
signal.reason: Directly addresses critical enterprise AI integration challenges (secure context, agent utility from comms platforms), offering high signal for AI software investment, data governance trends, and enterprise productivity solutions.

signal.title: OpenClaw has 500,000 instances and no enterprise kill switch
signal.reason: Highlights critical enterprise risk (lack of control/kill switch) for a large-scale AI/SaaS deployment, directly impacting business adoption and investment strategy. The scale (500k instances) amplifies the risk signal, making it highly relevant for a sophisticated investor/technologist evaluating impact and governance.

ai_value_chain.reason: Directly links strong financial performance (profit surges) of a hardware provider (Raspberry Pi) to the 'AI boom,' signaling broad market demand for computing hardware, including for edge AI and embedded systems. This offers a valuable market signal for investors tracking earnings and the pervasive impact of AI, and for technologists interested in hardware adoption beyond high-end accelerators.
